title: Icons
description: Introduces icons throughout different aspects of the game
body:
![Icons Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/823d8c1f8a8674b6364da2ae350416192f7f19eb.png)

*** ### **📋 About** Icons adds icons to menus, items, tooltips, GUI's... just everywhere you could imagine them fitting. The pack makes use of Custom Unicode Characters and Minecraft language files to add said icons. Icons is fully customizable using the [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod. *** ### **🧩 Split & Addon packs** #### Looking for only the Menu icons? Or only Enchantments? Remove the Food icons? Look no further!
Solo packs ||| |:-:|:-:| | **Icons - Advancements**
[![Advancements logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bUREHqer/b1bb63c5cd3cbed89a73f35800959c010cd9052c_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/advancements) | Bedrock-like Advancement icons for all Vanilla Advancements | | **Icons - Armor & Food**
[![Armor & Food logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K4Rt3g5p/843e1eeb8ea5b8aa67c18f387f4d869d6b4e896c_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-armor-food) | Armor and Food preview icons for the items | | **Icons - Effects**
[![Effects logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/unNvylAO/ffab4f35d8fc3d240c0d55b00ff8f9c5860b67e8_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-effects) | Effect icons for Potions, Tipped Arrows and Suspicious Stews | | **Icons - Enchantments**
[![Enchantments logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3cROwIvM/82e883aa21ba953e3cd73c451478de100b99b769_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-enchantments) | Enchantment icons for Enchantments | | **Icons - Menus**
[![Menus logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ATa1cCNb/4e8f14c3f959a9e6daaeecd84a6d7bb822f102cc_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-menus) | Menu icons | | **Icons - Numerals**
[![Numerals logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C54EmbDN/2e850021ad129fd0cb28a46a21e44e3afbf8b3f2_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-numerals) | Enchantment Levels and Potion Potency numeral badges up to lvl 100 | | **Icons - Tooltips**
[![Tooltips logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GuJbH2E8/7d09c2ea45f1b4c6bc1881a3683083392c63440f_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-tooltips) | Tooltip icons for several items like Fireworks and Banners |
Addon packs ||| |:-:|:-:| | **Icons - Armor & Food Remover**
[![Armor & Food Remover logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XsFesLGT/0981496e7f4e4ffbcc47600aa670678ceacace6e_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-armor-food-remover) | Armor and Food preview icons remover | | **Barebones Icons**
[![Barebones Icons logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w9SxsTSQ/0d9a205a84b9cf52850ac5667340f1cd252c7c32_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-icons) | Addon for [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) or [Icons - Menus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-menus) adapting the [Barebones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) style for the menu icons. | | **Simple Icons**
[![Simple Icons logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Dtnrv4P0/052387b1698c5d1b8feea321a4d4ba032375764c_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-icons) | Addon for [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) or [Icons - Menus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-menus) adapting a white, font-like style for the menu icons. | | **Small Icons**
[![Small Icons logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m5E71RR3/5a71be74579359d6b9b60ea73ed10ee895c90350_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-icons) | Addon for [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) or [Icons - Menus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-menus) adapting a small, font-sized style for the menu icons. | | **Small Simple Icons**
[![Small Simple Icons logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5vHB0xad/581f1abb91de70b910a10b9cc70a89d3c928f2c7_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-simple-icons) | Addon for [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) or [Icons - Menus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-menus) combining Simple Icons and Small Icons into a small, white, font-like style for the menu icons. |
***
✅ Packs & Addons by other creators [![](https://gistcdn.githack.com/Zartrix/84d5a34dd0fc834c2794a3d46282114a/raw/17b09b8bfbc667ea19b84ccd73690f104cb7e06c/icon.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) |||| |:-:|:-:|:-:| | [![Advertisement Removal Add-on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7Rq0ipFz/b0753e82cf369625097e85353b0c2d0cdc28f448.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-advertisement-removal) | [Vexcenot](https://modrinth.com/user/vexcenot) | Removes Icons Text-Logo if immersion breaking | | [![Icons Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l4AXiRxt/09bbf8163b7aeacbf701cb5a18fa7dc87ee29e51_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-compats) | [Fyoncle](https://modrinth.com/user/Fyoncle) | Additional icons for many mods, mostly featured in [Elysium Days](https://modrinth.com/modpack/elysium-days) | | [![Magisitas Rarity Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r5UzCz0M/images/7458f4423e58ccc1de966ddaff35d70aa96d9c47.gif)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/magisitas-rarity-icons) | [freddyencoop](https://modrinth.com/user/freddyencoop) | Custom rarities for all items - Compatible with Legendary Tooltips and Loot Beams | | [![Enchant Display: Roman numerals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sDjhAz4E/b3dba1f832001dfc09af0b526b224b00217c27e9_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-display) | [semasem](https://modrinth.com/user/semasem) | Enchantment Levels and Potion Potency numeral badges - standalone based on ours |
***
⚙️ Compatibility This pack is compatible with all resource packs, as long as it stays at the top of the resource packs selection We cannot guarantee that Icons will work with packs that change the font of Minecraft nor mods that make use of strings that we work with since it was made with the default textures and vanilla in mind
❓ How to use 1. Drop the pack into your resource packs folder, or Drag and Drop it in the Resource pack selection. 2. Select Icons.\ (Have it on top of other packs if you use more) 3. Select the language in which you want to play 4. “Force Unicode” must be turned to “off”! 5. Enjoy!
***
📄 Terms of Use & Attribution You can: - ✅ Use it in mod packs - ✅ Use it for Content Creation like YouTube videos (Linking back to this or the other available pages (Modrinth, Planetminecraft, CurseForge)) You cannot: - ❌ Redistribute edited or unedited assets - ❌ Re-upload the pack - ❌ Claim ownership over our assets These terms may be changed as we deem necessary and at any time. Versions of this pack before 1.9.2 make use of NegativeSpaces4 resource pack by AmberW/AmberWat which is under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International terms.
